MixSwitchEpi 0.0.9.500
  • Reference
    • MixSwitchEpi
    • Comparing Homogeneous and Heterogeneous Epidemics

MixSwitchEpi

This repository contains tools and models for epidemics with heterogeneous contact (activity) classes, with individuals able to switch between them through time.

It requires odin2 to run. ### Installation
